stage: Stage 10 (paper claims review) ROUND 2 of BUNDLE_LIFT_PROCEDURE
tier_profile: Tier 1 (deep) — intra-bundle consistency + cross-bundle cross-bridge checks
anchors_checked: BBN classification (paper29) — N_eff bounds, BBN-conformant vs -violator partition (§4)

round_2_scope: Re-verification of round-1's 8 FAILs + 1 WARN against the revised paper draft

sentences.section: Unified 7-class GD taxonomy and 3-tier applicability gradient
sentences.quote: The Phase~6m mechanism count is established by the Lean theorem \texttt{phase6m\_mechanism\_count}, which proves $|\text{allEntropicGravityCandidates}| + |\text{allJacobsonCandidates}| = 17$ — the lengths of the two enumerated lists for Tracks~B and~C respectively. Track~A's four candidates enter as inductive \texttt{CausalSetCandidate} constructors rather than as a \texttt{List}, so they are not summed by \texttt{phase6m\_mechanism\_count}; counting them separately (via case-exhaustion on the inductive type) brings the full Phase~6m roster to $4 + 8 + 9 = 21$ mechanisms across all three tracks. All 21 classify into the unified 7-class GD taxonomy (\texttt{phase6m\_class\_admits\_tier\_assignment}), with the 8/8 unanimous NO-GO closure on Track~B as the headline structural result.
sentences.quote_normalized: the phase 6m mechanism count is established by the lean theorem phase6m_mechanism_count, which proves |allentropicgravitycandidates| + |alljacobsoncandidates| = 17 -- the lengths of the two enumerated lists for tracks b and c respectively.
sentences.agent_notes: Round-2 verification: prose now correctly states what `phase6m_mechanism_count` proves (B+C=17 via list-length sum) and separately accounts for Track A's 4 inductive constructors via case-exhaustion. The 21-total framing is preserved as a roster summary, not as the theorem's body. The cross-reference to `phase6m_class_admits_tier_assignment` (which accepts a Phase6mGDClass arg covering all three tracks) backs the '21 classify into 7-class taxonomy' claim. Round-1 FAIL #1 RESOLVED.

sentences.quote: (b)~Track~B entropic-gravity DE (8 candidates) yields the \emph{first complete-mechanism-family unanimous NO-GO closure} in Phase~6m via two structurally distinct routes: four candidates (Verlinde~2017, Tsallis~HDE, Barrow~HDE, Odintsov-D'Onofrio-Paul) yield quantitative Bayesian bounds with $|\!\log\mathcal{B}| \geq 5$ (Jeffreys-decisive), formalized in the Lean aggregator \texttt{all\_quantitative\_bounds\_exceed\_jeffreys\_decisive}; the remaining four (Padmanabhan/CosMIn no-Lagrangian-scalar; Hossenfelder-Verlinde post-Yoon-Guha; Cadoni-Tuveri DEC via the GD theorem; HDE event-horizon wrong-sign $w_a$) are structurally NO-GO via mechanism-specific obstructions.
sentences.quote_normalized: track b entropic-gravity de (8 candidates) yields the first complete-mechanism-family unanimous no-go closure in phase 6m via two structurally distinct routes: four candidates (verlinde 2017, tsallis hde, barrow hde, odintsov-d'onofrio-paul) yield quantitative bayesian bounds with |log b| >= 5 (jeffreys-decisive).
sentences.agent_notes: Round-2 verification: abstract now correctly distinguishes the 4 quantitative Bayesian bounds (Verlinde / Tsallis / Barrow / Odintsov, formalized in `all_quantitative_bounds_exceed_jeffreys_decisive`) from the 4 structurally NO-GO mechanisms (Padmanabhan / Hossenfelder-Verlinde / Cadoni-Tuveri DEC / HDE event-horizon). Each of the four structural NO-GOs maps to its own resolved Lean theorem (verified above). The 'all eight' wording is replaced with the two-route framing. Round-1 FAIL #2 RESOLVED.

sentences.section: Phase 6m Track B: Per-mechanism Lean closures
sentences.quote: The eight Track~B mechanisms split into four with explicitly-quantitative $|\!\log\mathcal{B}|$ bounds (each individually exceeding the Jeffreys-decisive threshold $|\!\log\mathcal{B}| \geq 5$ and aggregated in \texttt{all\_quantitative\_bounds\_exceed\_jeffreys\_decisive}: Verlinde~2017, Tsallis~HDE, Barrow~HDE, Odintsov-D'Onofrio-Paul) and four structurally NO-GO mechanisms (Padmanabhan/CosMIn, Hossenfelder-Verlinde, Cadoni-Tuveri~DEC, HDE event-horizon). The 8 mechanism-level closures are listed first; two auxiliary supports for the Cadoni-Tuveri DEC entry follow.
sentences.quote_normalized: the eight track b mechanisms split into four with explicitly-quantitative |log b| bounds (each individually exceeding the jeffreys-decisive threshold and aggregated in all_quantitative_bounds_exceed_jeffreys_decisive) and four structurally no-go mechanisms.
sentences.agent_notes: Round-2 verification: §9.1 subsection renamed 'Per-mechanism Lean closures' (was previously implicit). The opener now explicitly declares the 4-quantitative + 4-structural-NO-GO split (matches the 8 mechanisms). The Cadoni-Tuveri DEC \item now incorporates the two former-sibling supports (`dec_cpl_excluded_from_desi_dr2_1sigma` and `dec_fails_orthogonality_principle`) as auxiliary Lean supports under the parent `cadoni_tuveri_dec_no_go_via_gd_theorem_w_eq_minus_1`. Counting the \item structure: 8 top-level \item entries (Verlinde, Padmanabhan, Hossenfelder-Verlinde, Cadoni-Tuveri (with 2 auxiliaries inline), HDE event-horizon, Tsallis, Barrow, Odintsov) = 8 mechanism-level closures. The earlier 10-vs-8 mismatch is gone. Round-1 FAIL #3 RESOLVED.

sentences.section: BBN classification of Phase 5x DM candidates
sentences.quote: The Lean theorem \texttt{bbn\_violators\_share\_n\_eff\_failure\_mode} establishes the universal $N_{\rm eff}$-channel mode-of-failure across the violator subset under default thermalization; the corresponding \texttt{at\_least\_three\_phase5x\_candidates\_bbn\_conformant} closes the $\geq 3$-of-5 unconditional pass.
sentences.quote_normalized: the lean theorem bbn_violators_share_n_eff_failure_mode establishes the universal n_eff-channel mode-of-failure across the violator subset under default thermalization; the corresponding at_least_three_phase5x_candidates_bbn_conformant closes the >=3-of-5 unconditional pass.
sentences.agent_notes: Round-2 verification: both theorem names resolve in `lean_deps.json` under SKEFTHawking.BBN. The replacement names (per Round-1 recommendation option (a)) preserve Pipeline Invariant 1 (no spurious aliases). Round-1 FAIL #4 RESOLVED.

sentences.quote: Critical-coupling positivity is established in Lean by \texttt{ADWMechanism.critical\_coupling\_pos}.

sentences.quote: At the PDG QCD scale $\Lambda_{\rm QCD} = \SI{0.1}{\giga\electronvolt}$ and Planck mass $M_P = 1.22 \times 10^{19}\,\text{GeV}$, the prediction is $\rho_{\rm DE} \approx 6.7 \times 10^{-9}\,\text{eV}^4$, sitting within ${\sim}240\times$ of the observed value [...] approximately $120$ orders of magnitude below the Planck-natural estimate $M_P^4 \approx 10^{112}\,\text{eV}^4$.
sentences.quote_normalized: at the pdg qcd scale lambda_qcd = 0.1 gev and planck mass m_p = 1.22 x 10^19 gev, the prediction is rho_de approx 6.7 x 10^-9 ev^4, sitting within ~240x of the observed value [...] approximately 120 orders of magnitude below the planck-natural estimate m_p^4 approx 10^112 ev^4.
sentences.agent_notes: Round-2 carry-forward (was PASS in Round-1): rho = (0.1)^6 / (1.22e19)^2 = 6.72e-45 GeV^4 = 6.72e-9 eV^4. Paper says 6.7e-9. Match within 0.3%. Ratio to observed (2.8e-11 eV^4) = 240x. log10(M_P^4 / rho_DE) = 120.5. delta_pct = 0.28%.

sentences.quote: the variant fits DESI~DR2 at $b \approx 0.21$, but this is more than $100\times$ the $b \lesssim 2 \times 10^{-3}$ chameleon Solar-System bound from the Cassini and Lunar Laser Ranging constraints
sentences.quote_normalized: the variant fits desi dr2 at b approx 0.21, but this is more than 100x the b <= 2 x 10^-3 chameleon solar-system bound from the cassini and lunar laser ranging constraints
sentences.agent_notes: Round-2 carry-forward (was PASS in Round-1): 0.21 / 2e-3 = 105 (paper says '>100x'). Theorem exists.
Round-2 carry-forward (was PASS in Round-1): all three Sakharov-related theorems resolve in lean_deps.json.

sentences.quote: The Lean theorem \texttt{vestigial\_phase\_eta\_violates\_microscope\_bound} is the quantitative falsifier for vestigial differential coupling (\texttt{norm\_num} on the comparison of the predicted $\eta = 1$ against the MICROSCOPE bound $10^{-15}$). The substantive numerical falsifier is $1.0 > 10^{-15}$, factor $\sim 10^{15}$ excess.

sentences.agent_notes: Round-2 carry-forward (was PASS in Round-1): theorem resolves in SKEFTHawking.EquivalencePrinciple. Numerical claim arithmetically correct.

summary.agent_text: Round-2: 14 anchored claims audited — all 14 PASS / 0 FAIL / 0 WARN. All 8 round-1 BLOCKERs (block:D5:1–8) and the 1 round-1 WARN (warn:D5:1) are deterministically auto-closed via tex+lean_deps inspection. No new findings introduced by the fixes.

non_blocking_followups.summary: Lean docstring drift in DarkSectorClassificationExtension.lean:262–266 — the docstring claims '4 (Track A) + 8 (Track B) + 9 (Track C) = 21 mechanism entries' but the theorem body proves only B+C=17. The paper's prose now correctly handles this asymmetry, but the Lean docstring should be brought into alignment in a follow-up sweep (recommended: option (a) from round-1 — prove a Track-A list-length lemma in CausalSetDarkEnergy.lean and strengthen `phase6m_mechanism_count` to sum all three lists to 21). This is non-blocking for D5 Stage-10/13 since the prose is internally consistent.

cross_bundle_consistency.D3_cross_bridge_status: PASS — D5 §7 now cites `MicroscopicCoefficientMatch.lean + HeatKernelExpansion.lean` for the heat-kernel a_0 framework. The round-1 finding noted that D3 §21 should also be retargeted away from `CosmologicalConstantEmergent.lean` (a fabricated name); that is a D3-side fix and is flagged in D3 lift QA, not blocking for D5. D5's local fix is uniformly consistent.
cross_bundle_consistency.D2_cross_bridge_status: PASS — D5 §2.1 Z16 anomaly content (T-0 / S-0 / C-1 candidates; +3 mod 16 hidden-charge constraint; tracked H_MixedChannelZ16Cancels hypothesis disclosure) consistent with D2's three-pillar synthesis.

stage10_round_2_verdict.rationale: All 8 round-1 BLOCKERs and 1 round-1 WARN deterministically auto-closed via tex inspection + lean_deps.json lookups + filesystem checks. No new findings introduced. The advisory non_blocking_followup (Lean docstring alignment in DarkSectorClassificationExtension.lean) is non-blocking for Stage-10/13 since the paper's prose is internally consistent with what the theorem actually proves.
